Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Simon]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 1''' — Simon is an eight-year-old boy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 1''' — Simon is the son of Kalman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Simon prefers working quietly and by himself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Simon has a sword hidden in a dusty rug in his house.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Simon is a character who has cared for his mother since he was a boy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 3''' — Simon is a skinny boy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Simon attempted to attack Cormac's legs with his sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Simon's mother is unconscious in the cave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Simon's mother is deceased.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Simon is not a Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 5''' — Simon is being held at dagger-point by a man in the forest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 5''' — Simon believes the Demon of the forest has let him live once before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 5''' — Simon wants help to retrieve people taken from his village by Overlord Malachi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 5''' — Simon has seen the white-haired man kill Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 5''' — Simon's hands are wounded.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — Simon wants to learn how to fight Travelers to bring the people of his village back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — Simon claims he has no talent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — Simon is a character who has been delivering messages and cleaning a tavern.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — Simon is an amateur swordsman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — Simon has not eaten in over three days.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Simon previously lived in a village.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Simon is a Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Simon fought three iron armors before being defeated.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Simon held forward the shattered remnants of a secondhand weapon he had bought from a desperate merchant’s guard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — Simon has been in Valinhall for at least a month.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — Simon's sword is single-edged and curved like Azura but less than half its length.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 9''' — Simon accepted the Eldest's deal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — Simon is traveling on foot with Denner toward Orgrith Cave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — Simon is a student undergoing a test in Orgrith Cave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — Simon is a character who uses the Nye essence and Benson's steel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — Simon is participating in a trial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — Simon fought a monster in the cave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — Simon cannot leave the cave for six nights after the current night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 12''' — Simon can push aside a giant mushroom cap with one hand after using a draught of steel strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 12''' — Simon is motivated to rescue Andra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Simon possesses enhanced reflexes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Simon is a six-year-old.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Simon has chain-like marks on his arms that move and crawl up his skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Simon can call liquid steel from Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — Simon is a young man who has been a Traveler for only a few weeks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — Simon can draw on the Nye's essence to increase his perception of time and reflexes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — Simon can call steel to join with the cool breath of the Nye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — Simon can draw on liquid steel to create chain-shaped shadows on his skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — An arrow was shot toward Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Simon uses Nye's breath to gain cool power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Simon's strength is bolstered by Benson's steel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Simon's arms are chain-shrouded when using his steel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Simon is a person who can call steel and summon Azura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Simon sent a message to Caela thanking her for the warning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Simon is traveling in a rumbling wagon bed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Simon is a Traveler from the Valinhall Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Simon grew up around Nurita's family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — Simon is interested in talking to the Nye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — Simon uses the strength of steel and the speed of the Nye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — Simon's shadow-chains have not yet reached his hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — Simon uses Nye essence to slow time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 19''' — Simon can summon the sword Azura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 19''' — Simon wears a black cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Simon is at the house if Leah is there.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 21''' — Simon possesses Nye essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 21''' — Simon has liquid strength running through him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 21''' — Simon has black chains on his forearms that look like living tattoos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 21''' — Simon has gifts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 21''' — Simon draws on steel and essence to increase his speed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 22''' — Simon is the only one in his group who can open a Gate to escape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 23''' — Simon is suspected to have died in a canyon between Bel Calem and Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 23''' — Simon lived in Myria before becoming a Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 23''' — Simon's mother was killed by Cormac during the collection of the sacrifice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 23''' — Simon's father was killed at the edge of the Latari Forest by two Travelers from Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 23''' — Simon's father was killed and his mother was tortured into insanity by Travelers from Enosh.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — Simon stated he could take care of her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Simon possesses a device.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Simon is a Traveler who draws power from Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Simon fought against the Damascans alone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Alin wants Simon to attend a strategy meeting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Simon's Gate opened onto his suite of rooms in Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Simon grew up in a village that was technically part of the Damascan Kingdom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Simon is the Valinhall Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Simon has killed many Damascan Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Simon's mother was killed by a Damascan Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Simon is not as set against Damasca as he pretends to be.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Simon spoke with Malachi before Alin arrived.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Simon has dangerously high influence over Eliadel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Simon can call steel and essence to infuse his body with cold strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Simon is a student or subordinate of Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Simon emerged from the healing pool with an imp gnawing on his shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Alin wants Simon to accompany them on their mission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Simon's room was found broken and shattered by battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Simon has a Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Simon can draw Valinhall steel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Simon is someone Alin intends to have a long talk with if he survives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Simon can focus his Nye essence to slow the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Simon is observing Leah and the King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Simon has an advisor from his Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Simon stepped through the Valinhall Gate to go home.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Simon walked through the stone door to the rain garden.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Alin suspects Simon is trying to kill the Valinhall Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Simon is a person who can call steel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Simon is working with Indirial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Simon is a companion of Indirial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 17''' — Simon stepped out of the Gate determined to never set foot in Naraka ever again.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Simon has been training with Indirial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Simon can call essence and steel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Simon is present in the scene and speaks to Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Simon has dolls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Simon ran through the halls of the House.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Alin suspects a black-cloaked man with a long sword might be Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Simon is a character who wears a mask and a cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Simon feels chains wrapping around his shoulders, ribs, and neck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Simon wears a mask.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Simon's eyes are not visible through his mask, only a dim, sourceless light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Simon fought the Valinhall Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Simon was battling the Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Simon fell on Valin sword-first.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — Simon woke up in a strange room in a strange city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — Simon carries a long Valinhall blade.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Simon uses a crutch made by the Nye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Simon uses steel-enhanced strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — Simon has been in debt to the Eldest since he first came to Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 5''' — Simon is a character who uses Nye essence and possesses a sword named Azura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — Simon is a student being taught by Valin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — Simon is a character who uses the blade Azura in combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 8''' — Simon felt like an idiot for answering an obvious question.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Simon has Traveled through Naraka a handful of times.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Simon uses shadows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Simon wondered if they would find anything before reaching Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Simon holds Azura's hilt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Simon uses a mask that makes his eyes flare white and become transparent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Simon can summon a massive hammer made of mirror-bright steel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Simon uses a mask that provides steel and essence without running out.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Using the mask causes Simon's chains to grow rapidly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Simon can release Nye essence to return the world to near normal speed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Simon began to fall after the Orange Light failed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — Simon is fighting Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — Simon falls from the sky like a silver-and-black lightning bolt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Simon is currently outside of Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Simon uses stone, steel, and a mask for protection.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Simon is unconscious.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Lycus wants to help Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Simon is associated with the doll Rebekkah.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Simon previously killed soldiers under Erastes' command.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — Alin needs to take care of Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — Simon was doing things that Ilana thought were impossible before she left.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Simon was in Valinhall before waking up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Simon is a character who was recently paralyzed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Simon is being set up as the Founder's heir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Simon is a character.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Simon is a character who can open Gates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Simon has chains on his back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — Simon is a person Leah has worked with to seal an Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — Simon enters the throne room through a hole in the stone wall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — Simon carries a large Tartarus steel hammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — Simon wears a mask that is half silver and half black.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Simon has recovered enough from the mask that Valin and the dolls pronounced him fit for duty.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Simon is a person Indirial mentions in relation to the Dragon's Fangs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Simon is away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Simon has fought the last Incarnation of Endross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Indirial once saved the life of a child named Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Simon watches a staged contest between King Zakareth the Sixth and the Endross Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Simon considers getting Leah out of the area.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 23''' — Simon rose from the walls of Cana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Simon is struggling to move his body after using the mask.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Simon is a person who has bargained with the Eldest before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Leah considers telling Simon about her meeting with Queen Cynara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Simon is sitting in a graveyard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Simon holds the sword Mithra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Simon is binding himself to Valinhall through the use of his powers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Simon has at least five Incarnations, potentially as many as seven.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Simon can draw on his power in another Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Simon slammed a giant hammer onto Grandmaster Naraka's head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — When Simon hit Grandmaster Naraka, ash sprayed out instead of blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Simon reported that the King is moving against Elysia after trying to destroy Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Simon's sword has a line of gold running down the middle that sings to Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Simon gives orders to Andra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Simon uses a gold-and-silver blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — White Light can empower Simon with the might of Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Simon has proven his valor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — Simon has accepted the position of Queen Leah's personal protector.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — Simon is the Founder of Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — Simon holds the positions of royal protector and custodian of the Incarnations.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
